author: quietbyday
description: Merge one note into another while adding the old name as an alias and updating all internal links. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Quietbyday
manifest.description: Merge one note into another while adding the old name as an alias and updating all internal links.
manifest.name: Merge as Alias

name: Merge as Alias

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Raised minimum app version to 1.6.6 to match the `processFrontMatter` and `trashFile` APIs used
- Popout-compatible timers now use `window.setTimeout()` (corrects the `activeWindow.setTimeout()` shipped in 0.5.1)
- Added build provenance attestation to the release workflow
- Release notes are now generated automatically from this changelog

releases.author: Quietbyday
releases.description: Several changes to meet Obsidian Community Plugin requirements.

releases.author: Quietbyday
releases.description: Minor changes to manifest to satisfy requirements for Obsidian Community Plugins.

releases.author: Quietbyday
releases.description: Minor changes to manifest and package information. No functional changes.
releases.name: 0.4.1-beta

releases.author: Quietbyday
releases.description:
Changes:

- Added "Confirm file merge" setting in the options panel
- The confirmation dialog now properly supports "Don't ask again"
- Users can re-enable the confirmation dialog anytime from Settings → Merge as Alias
- Improved safety before merging files
- Added Changelog
releases.name: 0.4.0-beta

releases.author: Quietbyday
releases.description:
### Changes in 0.3.0-beta

- Added **"Confirm file merge"** setting (matches Obsidian core style)
- Users can now disable the confirmation dialog permanently
- The "Don't ask again" checkbox in the confirmation dialog now works correctly and is saved
- Users can re-enable the confirmation dialog anytime from the settings panel

### Installation

Install via BRAT using:
https://github.com/quietbyday/obsidian-merge-as-alias
releases.name: 0.3.0-beta

releases.author: Quietbyday
releases.description:
Initial beta release of Merge as Alias

Features:
- Merge notes while preserving old name as alias
- Automatic link updating
- Configurable frontmatter merging (lists + text fields)
- Settings panel
releases.name: 0.2.1-beta

releases.author: Quietbyday
releases.description:
### Changes in 0.2.0-beta

- Added confirmation dialog before merging (similar to Obsidian's core merge)
- Improved safety when merging files
- Minor UI/UX improvements
releases.name: 0.2.0-beta
